prestazioni: Forced induction upgrade via Roush Performance supercharger kit (part #4765K) designed specifically for the 3.5L EcoBoost V6 (engine code: T35A) with a 2.65L Eaton TVS2650 blower, 10-12 psi boost, and integrated air-to-water intercooler, pushing output to 650+ WHP on E85 fuel with supporting fuel system upgrades (Fore Innovations 450 LPH dual-pump kit, ID1000x injectors, and Radium Engineering port injection kit).

Full drivetrain reinforcement with a Quaife ATB differential (part #QDF15H) for the front and rear axles, paired with a Ford Performance heavy-duty transfer case (part #M-7007-M2C) and a custom 4.56:1 gear set from Revolution Gear & Axle to handle increased torque while maintaining off-road crawl ratios.

Suspension overhaul with Fox Racing 2.5 Factory Series DSC (Dual Speed Compression) coilovers (part #980-06-180) with remote reservoirs, custom valving for 35-inch BFGoodrich KM3 tires, and a Bronco Raptor-specific Hellwig sway bar kit (part #7992) to reduce body roll during high-speed desert runs, complemented by a set of King Off-Road bypass shocks (part #25001-405A) for the rear.
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using a Bronco Raptor-specific Liberty Walk LB Works kit (part #LB-BR22), extending fender flares by 3.5 inches per side with carbon fiber construction, paired with a custom front splitter and rear diffuser from Anderson Composites (part #AC-FO-BR22) for aggressive aerodynamics.

Full interior rewrap in Alcantara suede with red contrast stitching, featuring Recaro Pole Position seats (part #RECARO-PP-FORD-BR) with integrated 6-point harnesses, a custom roll cage from Custom Cages (part #CC-FO-BR22) with integrated LED light bar mounts, and a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (part #MOMO-78-FORD) with quick-release hub.

Exterior lighting upgrade with Baja Designs Squadron Pro LED pods (part #447611) mounted on a custom front bumper from Addictive Desert Designs (part #ADD-12019), paired with a set of Rigid Industries D-Series Pro LED rock lights (part #201913) and a custom rear light bar setup using Baja Designs XL80 LED bars (part #447511) for maximum visibility during night off-roading.
